item.title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]

CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.

Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance

item.title: WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter
(Utilities)
The WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter download free and convert/Migrate MBOX to Outlook PST files in Outlook. By using this tool users can simply convert all emails and attachments from MBOX to PST file format without losing any single bit of data. It works with all mbox-supported email clients such as - Thunderbird, Eudora, OperaMail, PocoMail, Entourage, AppleMail, etc. The Migration of MBOX files to the Outlook PST file format does not require the installation of Outlook. However, before the process of conversion, this program permits you to check and scan your MBOX data. The MBOX to PST Converter operates with every version of Microsoft Outlook such as 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, and 2010. As a result, it works with all versions of Windows up to 11. Technical and non-technical users can both use this tool since it is user-friendly. Your technical support staff is available around-the-clock, before purchasing this tool users must try its free trial pack. Users can get a demo version of this program from its official website if they want to know more about it.
https://www.wholeclear.com/mbox/pst/

[read more]

item.title: OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ost-to-pst-converter
item.itunes:summary:
OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
SysInspire OST to PST Converter Software will help to convert Outlook OST file data to Outlook PST without any data loss. It can convert OST files to PST and 13+ other file formats including MBOX, Office 365, Gmail, Yahoo Mail, vCard, EML, EMLX, CSV, MSG, ICS, HTML, MHTML, etc. This software is designed with a simple user interface that can be used by every person, even if they have no technical knowledge. Our teams are always available 24/7 via email and chat to solve any queries related to the OST to PST conversion process. If you are not satisfied with using this converter software, in this case, our company provides a money-back guarantee within 30 days.

[read more]

item.title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen drive File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Is it possible to get back deleted documents folder without facing any difficulty? Download well developed Pen drive File Recovery Software that easily retrieve user valuable office documents, birthday photographs, wedding video clips, holiday picture and many more from accidentally formatted flash storage drive. Free data revival application is simple to operate and provide facility to restore lost or missing folder at user specified location on computer system. Affordable USB file rescue program support recovery of various types of files such as music, audio, video, image, text etc from corrupted pen drive.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:

item.title: WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter
(File Management)
Free Download WholeClear Thunderbird To PST Converter is the most famous tool to migrate Thunderbird mailbox data to PST for Outlook. This software efficiently Converts single or bulk Thunderbird to Outlook PST file format without destroying data. It provides progressive features that enable to migration of complete mailbox data with attachments from Thunderbird to PST file. It has a straightforward and effortless user interface that makes it easy to operate and understand for non-professional users. It's functioned with Outlook and Windows versions up to 11. Throughout the procedure of conversion, it keeps the actual structure of data. This software automatically selects configure Thunderbird profile for conversions. For user ease, it also offers a technical support staff to solve users' queries/problems. Key Features of Thunderbird To PST Converter - Instant convert single or bulk Thunderbird mailbox items to Outlook Automatically select Thunderbird profiles from their actual location for conversion. Provides options to create PST files- single or multiple PST files Support all Outlook and Windows versions up to 11 Show preview of complete mbox files before conversion The free trial pack is also availiable to check its working performance.
Visit Here:- https://www.wholeclear.com/thunderbird/pst/
[read more]

It provides progressive features that enable to migration of complete mailbox data with attachments from Thunderbird to PST file. It has a straightforward and effortless user interface that makes it easy to operate and understand for non-professional users. It's functioned with Outlook and Windows versions up to 11. item.title: Software for USB Drive Revival [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Software for USB Drive Revival [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Software for USB Drive Revival
(Utilities)
Download retrieval software from www.driverecoverysoftware.org to recover accidentally deleted folder, file, images and videos. USB Media Recovery Software is helpful to recover formatted file and folder in few mouse clicks. Highly technical recovery program provides facility to retrieve deleted file due to some common human mistake.
